- PR #1009 closes ENG-183
- PR #1010 closes ENG-130

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT p.number, p.closes_linear, COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count FROM github_pull_requests p WHERE p.state = 'merged' AND p.closes_linear IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM linear_issues l WHERE l.id = p.closes_linear AND l.state != 'done') ORDER BY p.number"}
